message:
feat(abi): delegate setaliasent, endaliasent, getaliasent, and getaliasent_r to host libc via runtime dlsym

- Replace no-op/stub implementations of setaliasent(), endaliasent(),
  getaliasent(), and getaliasent_r() with runtime dlsym delegation via
  resolve_host_symbol_raw(), completing the alias database function
  family migration to host delegation alongside the getaliasbyname/
  getaliasbyname_r changes from a prior commit
- getaliasent() sets errno to ENOENT on NULL return from host libc
- getaliasent_r() delegates the full reentrant signature to host
- All functions retain their existing fallback behavior (no-op/NULL/ENOENT)
  when the host symbol is unavailable
- Update ABI tests to cover the new delegation paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
